{{Game |Guid=13cc1bd2-8d5b-407c-9fc8-bf2fc44ac1da |Name=EA Sports College Football 27 |Aliases=CFB27 |Image=Bafkreica6sm4vmznaddpvlhcdmpgwtyvbhnahfcf5znnm7qwucpgvnszki.webp |Deck=EA Sports' college football series returns for the 2026 season. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-07-09 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Cover Athlete, Concepts/Platinum Trophy, Concepts/PlayStation Trophies, Concepts/Achievements, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Year in the Title, Concepts/Licensed Game |Developers=Companies/EA Tiburon |Franchises=Franchises/EA Sports College Football |Genres=Genres/Football |Platforms=Platforms/PlayStation 5, Platforms/Xbox Series X S, Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Electronic Arts }} == Overview == [[Companies/EA Sports|EA Sports]]' third season for their college football series, which was revived in 2024, and continues to feature the names and likeness of real student athletes.

{{Game |Guid=5d350a96-5eb1-4e50-bc88-97ed038e372b |Name=Echograph |Image=Echograph.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--echograph2-06-02-2026.jpg |Deck=Take pictures of ghosts and end a family curse. |ReleaseDateType=Full |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Survival Horror, Concepts/Female Protagonists, Concepts/Steam |Developers=Companies/Pappy's Pipe Dream |Genres=Genres/Action Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Pappy's Pipe Dream |Themes=Themes/Horror }}

revision.comment: Eco City Inc is an isometric industrial simulation game with a low-poly 3D aesthetic. Inspired by titles like Rise of Industry, the game tasks players with building a thriving industrial hub from a top-down perspective. The core gameplay revolves aro
revision.text:
{{Game |Guid=0fabc26e-3a7a-44d5-8240-84f3b7a94c29 |Name=Eco City Inc |Aliases=Eco City |Deck=A top-down, low-poly industrial management simulation focused on balancing factory production with waste recycling and energy efficiency. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2024-11-12 |Genres=Genres/Simulation |Locations=Locations/Capitol City |Objects=Objects/Factory, Objects/Remote Mines |Platforms=Platforms/Android |Themes=Themes/Management }} In Eco City Inc, players take on the role of an industrial architect tasked with transforming a vast isometric map into a functioning economic powerhouse. The game emphasizes the logistical challenges of modern industry, where every factory built requires a steady supply of energy and creates byproducts that must be managed.
Key Features:
Industrial Expansion: Construct various types of factories to produce goods and grow the city's economy.
Power Management: Build and maintain an energy grid to keep production lines running smoothly.
Sustainability & Waste: Unlike traditional builders, players must actively manage pollution and waste through recycling facilities and sustainable practices.
Low-Poly Aesthetic: A clean, 3D low-poly art style that provides clarity for complex city layouts.
Isometric Strategy: Plan your city layout carefully to optimize transport and resource flow.

page.title: Games/Edenfall: Legacy of the First Wardens

revision.text: {{Game |Guid=73bd960a-9ac2-49bd-8f4b-3229eb1dd5db |Name=Edenfall: Legacy of the First Wardens |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_capsulasssfe_2x-06-02-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--library_heraasdfadsfo_2x-06-02-2026.jpg |Deck=A magical action-adventure with a protagonist who can transform into multiple animals. |ReleaseDateType=Quarter |QuarterPart=Q4 |QuarterYearPart=2026 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Magic, Concepts/Transformation |Developers=Companies/Everflux |Genres=Genres/Action Adventure |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Everflux |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }}

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=6d200e7d-2a02-4795-b29d-5175b2ae1ec6 |Name=Edwin Earstwhile: Medical Examiner |ReleaseDateType=None }}"

revision.text:
{{Game |Guid=73142b21-5d1b-46c1-8a15-ebd074f2c881 |Name=Einlanzer |Aliases=Einlanzer 2017 |Image=Ss a54e187c367321f19f38f79134db27b9fa1084a2.1920x1080.jpg |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2017-03-01 |Developers=Companies/Nostalgia |Genres=Genres/Role Playing |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Addicting Games |Themes=Themes/Fantasy }} Einlanzer is a full-scale, traditional indie fantasy role-playing game heavily inspired by the classic JRPGs of the 1990s. Developed by Andrew Ryan Henke and published by Nostalgia Addict Games, the project delivers an expansive, old-school adventure balancing an emotional narrative with deep strategic turn-based mechanics.
The story of Einlanzer was written by a professional fantasy novelist, and has 28 original music tracks. Einlanzer has a highly strategic battle system, massive scope, and difficult moral decisions that permanently affect the storyline.
# Story Overview The narrative centers on a massive conflict where the fates of the Earth, Heaven, and Hell intertwine. Players follow a group of heroes through a deep, thought-provoking storyline crafted by a professional fantasy novelist. Throughout the journey, players are forced to make difficult moral decisions that permanently impact the plot development, leading toward three distinct endings. # Key Features and Gameplay -Classic Turn-Based Combat: Features a highly tactical battle system focused on managing enemy elemental weaknesses and utilizing specific sub-classes. -Massive Party & Scope: ncludes 10 main playable characters who interact actively during exploration and dynamic dialogue outside of core quests. -Deep Customization: Hundreds of unique weapons, armor pieces, and accessories available to fine-tune character stats and capabilities. -Content Richness: Offers more than 40 hours of gameplay across dozens of side dungeons, optional locations, and hidden quests. -Original Soundtrack: Includes 28 original music tracks composed specifically to enhance the game's atmosphere.

{{Game |Guid=7ef1a007-4713-4fa4-a525-b75e32e98464 |Name=El Paso, Elsewhere 2 |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--coc78d-06-09-2026.webp |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--ss_a76bc949fb74df401c78275c917afcf2ae0fa0fd-1920x1080-06-09-2026.jpg |Deck=The sequel to Strange Scaffold's run and gun action shooter. |ReleaseDateType=None |Concepts=Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Bullet Time, Concepts/Dual Wielding, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Steam Achievements, Concepts/Steam Cloud |Developers=Companies/Strange Scaffold |Franchises=Franchises/El Paso |Genres=Genres/Action |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Strange Scaffold, Companies/Frosty Pop }}

{{Game |Guid=ab0daea9-fc9a-4726-a615-8e79382fd628 |Name=Erosion |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--erosion-06-20-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--erosionb-06-20-2026.jpg |Deck=A voxel-based roguelike where every death costs the protagonist a decade. |ReleaseDateType=None |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Voxel, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Roguelike, Concepts/Steam Cloud, Concepts/Steam Achievements |Developers=Companies/Plot Twist |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Lyrical Games |Games=Games/Sifu |Themes=Themes/Western }}

{{Game |Guid=be2dc445-0dc9-4574-9962-ca9e6d476d7f |Name=Escape Simulator 2 |Image=Library_capsule_2x.jpg |Deck=A first-person escape room game that supports user-created rooms, featuring both single-player and cooperative modes |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2025-10-27 |Concepts=Concepts/Steam Deck Verified, Concepts/Steam Cloud, Concepts/Steam Workshop, Concepts/Steam Trading Cards, Concepts/Steam Achievements, Concepts/Achievements, Concepts/Cross Platform Multiplayer |Developers=Companies/Pine Studio |Genres=Genres/Puzzle |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Pine Studio }} == Overview == A first-person escape room game that supports user-created rooms, featuring both single-player and cooperative modes. Sequel to Escape Simulator, featuring a more realistic art style.

{{Game |Guid=3847c0af-84f7-4596-b36b-7fceba583296 |Name=Eternal Palace Sakura |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--eternalpalace-1780526041608-06-09-2026.webp |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--screenshot-2026-06-09-at-7-31-15-pm-06-09-2026.png |Deck=A roguelike action game featuring a catgirl fighting her way through a labyrinth of encounters. |ReleaseDateType=Year |YearPart=2026 |Concepts=Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Female Protagonists, Concepts/Feline Humanoid, Concepts/Roguelike, Concepts/Polygonal 3D |Developers=Companies/Denneko Yuugi |Genres=Genres/Action |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Denneko Yuugi |Themes=Themes/Anime }}
